Your Prelaunch
▪ 	Your Prelaunch will actually be closer to a PLF Prelaunch
▪ 	It’s about letting your people know that something is coming
▪ 	It’s often about co-creation
▪ 	Think about how you can get your people to help your book
promotion. How can you leverage their influence?
▪ 	Use the standard PLF Mental Triggers from Module 2
